## Compatibility Notes

## Document Privacy

- [ ] I did not commit private legal, school, medical, finance, HR, government, or company documents.
- [ ] Any sample files are public, synthetic, or sanitized.
- [ ] If export behavior changed, I included a reproducible test note or sample description.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally or I explained why it could not be run.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented when needed.
- [ ] New compatibility claims are reflected in `docs/COMPATIBILITY.md`.
